entries.name: Fel Domination
entries.desc: Your next Imp, Voidwalker, Incubus, Succubus, Felhunter, or Felguard Summon spell is free and has its casting time reduced by 90%.

entries.name: Soul Leech
entries.desc: All single-target damage done by you and your minions grants you and your pet shadowy shields that absorb 3% of the damage dealt for 15 sec, up to 5% of maximum health.

entries.name: Burning Rush
entries.desc: Increases your movement speed by 50%, but also damages you for 4% of your maximum health every 1 sec. Movement impairing effects may not reduce you below 100% of normal movement speed. Lasts until canceled.

entries.name: Fel Pact
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Fel Domination by 60 sec.

entries.name: Demon Skin
entries.desc:
Your Soul Leech absorption now passively recharges at a rate of 0.2% of maximum health every 1 sec, and may now absorb an additional 5% of maximum health.

Increases your armor by 45%.

entries.name: Fel Armor
entries.desc:
When Soul Leech absorbs damage, 5% of damage taken is absorbed and spread out over 5 sec.

Reduces damage taken by 1.5%.

entries.name: Fiendish Stride
entries.desc: Reduces the damage dealt by Burning Rush by 10%. Burning Rush increases your movement speed by an additional 20%.

entries.name: Demonic Embrace
entries.desc: Stamina increased by 10%.

entries.name: Nightmare
entries.desc: Increases the amount of damage required to break your fear effects by 60%.

entries.name: Horrify
entries.desc: Your Fear causes the target to tremble in place instead of fleeing in fear.

entries.name: Demonic Fortitude
entries.desc: Increases you and your pets' maximum health by 5%.

entries.name: Banish
entries.desc: Banishes an enemy Demon, Aberration, or Elemental, preventing any action for 30 sec. Limit 1. Casting Banish again on the target will cancel the effect.

entries.name: Curse of Exhaustion
entries.desc:
Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

entries.name: Curse of Tongues
entries.desc:
Forces the target to speak in Demonic, increasing the casting time of all spells by 30% for 1 min.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

entries.name: Infernal Beneficiary
entries.desc: Healing done by Drain Life also heals your primary demon at 400% effectiveness.

entries.name: Mortal Coil
entries.desc: Horrifies an enemy target into fleeing, incapacitating for 3 sec and healing you for 20% of maximum health.

entries.name: Pact of the Annihilan
entries.desc: Increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

entries.name: Demonic Circle
entries.desc:
Summons a Demonic Circle for 15 min. Cast Demonic Circle: Teleport to teleport to its location and remove all movement slowing effects.

You also learn:

 Demonic Circle: Teleport
Teleports you to your Demonic Circle and removes all movement slowing effects.

entries.name: Pact of the Satyr
entries.desc: Increases your haste by 2%.

entries.name: Improved Mortal Coil
entries.desc: Increases the range of Mortal Coil by 10 yds and Mortal Coil now heals for an additional 5% of maximum health.

entries.name: Dark Pact
entries.desc: Sacrifices 20% of your current health to shield you for 200% of the sacrificed health plus an additional 950 for 20 sec. Usable while suffering from control impairing effects.

entries.name: Foul Mouth
entries.desc: Casting Curse of Exhaustion, Curse of Tongues, or Curse of Weakness now curses all enemies within 10 yds of the target.

entries.name: Empowered Healthstone
entries.desc: Healthstones heal you for an additional 5% additional health.

entries.name: Abyss Walker
entries.desc: Using Demonic Circle: Teleport or your Demonic Gateway reduces all damage you take by 4% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Fortified Soul
entries.desc: Soul Leech may now absorb an additional 5% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Teachings of the Black Harvest
entries.desc:
Your primary pets gain a bonus effect.

Imp: Successful Singe Magic casts grant the target 4% damage reduction for 5 sec.

Voidwalker: Reduces the cooldown of Shadow Bulwark by 30 sec.

Felhunter: Reduces the cooldown of Devour Magic by 5 sec.

Sayaad: Reduces the cooldown of Seduction by 10 sec and causes the target to walk faster towards the demon.

entries.name: Gorefiend's Avarice
entries.desc: Drain Life now channels 100% faster and restores health 100% faster.

entries.name: Ichor of Devils
entries.desc: Dark Pact sacrifices only 5% of your current health for the same shield value.

entries.name: Frequent Donor
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Dark Pact by 15 sec.

entries.name: Pact of the Eredar
entries.desc: Increases your Intellect by 3%.

entries.name: Pact of the Nathrezim
entries.desc: Increases your Leech by 2%.

entries.name: Demonic Resilience
entries.desc: Reduces the chance you will be critically struck by 2%. All damage your primary demon takes is reduced by 8%.

entries.name: Empowered Drain Life
entries.desc: Drain Life heals for an additional 200% of damage dealt and grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of damage dealt.

entries.name: Strength of Will
entries.desc: Unending Resolve reduces damage taken by an additional 15%.

entries.name: Dark Accord
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Unending Resolve by 45 sec.

entries.name: Demonic Gateway
entries.desc: Creates a demonic gateway between two locations. Activating the gateway transports the user to the other gateway. Each player can use a Demonic Gateway only once per 90 sec.

entries.name: Howl of Terror
entries.desc: Let loose a terrifying howl, causing 5 enemies within 10 yds to flee in fear, disorienting them for 20 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

entries.name: Shadowfury
entries.desc: Stuns all enemies within 8 yds for 3 sec.

entries.name: Swift Artifice
entries.desc: Reduces the cast time of Soulstone and Create Healthstone by 50%.

entries.name: Soul Link
entries.desc:
5% of all damage you take is taken by your demon pet instead. 

While Grimoire of Sacrifice is active, your Stamina is increased by 3%.

entries.name: Frequent Traveler
entries.desc: Reduces the cast time of Demonic Gateway by 0.5 sec and you can now use Demonic Gateways twice before triggering a cooldown.

entries.name: Fel Synergy
entries.desc: Soul Leech also heals you for 8% and your pet for 25% of the absorption it grants.

entries.name: Oppressive Darkness
entries.desc:
Reduces the cooldown of Shadowfury by 15 sec and increases its radius by 2 yds.

Reduces the cooldown of Howl of Terror by 5 sec and it now fears 5 additional enemies.

entries.name: Pact of Gluttony
entries.desc:
Healthstones you conjure for yourself are now Demonic Healthstones and can be used multiple times in combat. Demonic Healthstones cannot be traded.

 Demonic Healthstone
Instantly restores 25% health. 60 sec cooldown.

entries.name: Soulburn
entries.desc:
Consumes a Soul Shard, unlocking the hidden power of your spells.

Demonic Circle: Teleport: Increases your movement speed by 50% and makes you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

Demonic Gateway: Can be cast instantly.

Drain Life: Gain an absorb shield equal to the amount of healing done for 30 sec. This shield cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

Healthstone: Increases the healing of your Healthstone by 30% and increases your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

entries.name: Blight of Weakness
entries.desc:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing the time between their attacks by 100% and reducing their critical strike chance by 10% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

entries.name: Blight of Tongues
entries.desc:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing their casting time of all spells by 100% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

entries.name: Hand of Gul'dan
entries.desc:
Calls down a demonic meteor full of Wild Imps which burst forth to attack the target.

Deals up to 563 Shadowflame damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summons 3 Wild Imps.

entries.name: Demoniac
entries.desc:
Grants access to the following abilities:

 Demonbolt
Send the fiery soul of a fallen demon at the enemy, causing 1,521 Shadowflame damage.

 Demonic Core
When your Wild Imps fade or are imploded, you have a 10% chance to absorb their life essence, granting you a stack of Demonic Core. 

When your summoned Dreadstalkers fade away, you have a 100% chance to absorb their life essence, granting you a stack of Demonic Core.

Demonic Core reduces the cast time of Demonbolt by 100%. Maximum 4 stacks.

entries.name: Call Dreadstalkers
entries.desc: Summons 2 ferocious Dreadstalkers to attack the target for 12 sec.

entries.name: Dominant Hand
entries.desc: Increases damage dealt by Hand of Gul'dan to its main target by 20%.

entries.name: Fel Intellect
entries.desc: Increases your Intellect by 2%.

entries.name: Practiced Rituals
entries.desc: Increases your Mastery by 2%.

entries.name: Dreadlash
entries.desc: When your Dreadstalkers charge into battle, their Dreadbite attack now hits all targets within 8 yards and deals 10% more damage.

entries.name: Imp-erator
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of your Wild Imp's Fel Firebolt by 15%.

entries.name: Implosion
entries.desc: Demonic forces suck 6 of your Wild Imps toward the target, and then cause them to violently explode, dealing 518 Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards.

entries.name: Power Siphon
entries.desc: Instantly sacrifice up to 2 Wild Imps, generating 2 charges of Demonic Core that cause Demonbolt to deal 30% additional damage.

entries.name: Summon Felguard
entries.desc: Summons a Felguard under your command as a powerful melee combatant.

entries.name: Infernal Rapidity
entries.desc: When your Wild Imps cast Fel Firebolt, they have 10% chance to instantly cast another Fel Firebolt at 200% effectiveness.

entries.name: Rune of Shadows
entries.desc: Reduces the cast time of Shadow Bolt by 10% and increases its damage by 15%.

entries.name: Carnivorous Stalkers
entries.desc: Your Dreadstalkers' attacks have a 10% chance to trigger an additional Dreadbite.

entries.name: Fel Armaments
entries.desc: The cooldown of your Felguard's Felstorm is reduced by 10 sec and damage dealt to your primary demon is reduced by 10%.

entries.name: Imp Gang Boss
entries.desc: Hand of Gul'dan now empowers 1 of the Wild Imps it summons, increasing its damage dealt by 100%.

entries.name: Demonic Brutality
entries.desc: Damaging critical strikes dealt by you and your demons deal 230% damage instead of the usual 200%.

entries.name: Inner Demons
entries.desc: You passively summon a Wild Imp to fight for you every 12 sec.

entries.name: Summon Demonic Tyrant
entries.desc:
Summon a Demonic Tyrant that damages your target for 15 sec. 

Damage dealt by Demonic Tyrant is increased by 10% for each Wild Imp and Dreadstalker active.

entries.name: Blighted Maw
entries.desc: The fangs of your Dreadstalkers are coated in corrosive bile, causing Dreadbite to deal additional damage equal to 50% of damage dealt as Plague damage.

entries.name: Improved Demonic Tactics
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of your primary demon by 50% of your critical strike chance.

entries.name: Empowered Felstorm
entries.desc: Increases the damage of your Felguard's Felstorm by 20% and its duration by 4.0 sec.

entries.name: Spiteful Reconstitution
entries.desc: Increases Demonbolt damage by 10% and consuming a Demonic Core has a chance to summon a Wild Imp.

entries.name: Tyrant's Oblation
entries.desc: Your Demonic Tyrant also empowers you while active, increasing your haste by 8%.

entries.name: Antoran Armaments
entries.desc:
Your Demonic Tyrant is equipped with armor forged within Antorus, increasing their armor by 10%. While summoned, your Demonic Tyrant now assaults enemies with powerful melee attacks.

 Burning Cleave
Cleaves all enemies in a cone in front of the caster, inflicting 366 Shadowflame damage. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Flametouched
entries.desc: Increases the attack speed of your Dreadstalkers by 10% and their critical strike chance by 15%.

entries.name: Demonic Knowledge
entries.desc: Hand of Gul'dan has a 5% chance to generate a charge of Demonic Core.

entries.name: Sacrificed Souls
entries.desc: Shadow Bolt and Demonbolt deal 2% additional damage per demon you have summoned.

entries.name: Reign of Tyranny
entries.desc: Your Demonic Tyrant lasts an additional 5 sec and extends the duration of your Dreadstalkers by 15 sec when summoned.

entries.name: Master Summoner
entries.desc: Increases Mastery by 3% and reduces the cast time of your Summon Demonic Tyrant and Summon Felguard by 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Demonic Calling
entries.desc: Call Dreadstalkers costs 1 less Soul Shard and its cast time is reduced by 50%.

entries.name: Doom
entries.desc:
When Demonbolt consumes a Demonic Core it inflicts impending doom upon the target, dealing 1,531 Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds of its target after 20 sec or when removed. Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets.

Hand of Gul'dan reduces the duration of Doom by 3 sec.

entries.name: Hellbent Commander
entries.desc: Your demons deal 1.0% increased damage for each demon you control.

entries.name: Grimoire: Imp Lord
entries.desc:
Summons an Imp Lord to assist you in combat for 20 sec and will remove 1 harmful effect from you when summoned. 

Transforms into Singe Magic while on cooldown.

entries.name: Grimoire: Fel Ravager
entries.desc:
Summons a Fel Ravager to assist you in combat for 20 sec and will purge 1 beneficial magic effect from an enemy.

Turns into Devour Magic while on cooldown.

entries.name: Summon Vilefiend
entries.desc: Call Dreadstalkers also summons a Vilefiend that assists you in combat for 15 sec.

entries.name: Summon Doomguard
entries.desc:
Summons a Doomguard to assist you in combat for 12 sec. Consuming a Demonic Core reduces the cooldown of Summon Doomguard by 3 sec.

 Doom Bolt Volley
Sends a volley of malefic bolts at 5 enemies within 40 yds, inflicting 1,573 Shadow damage to each target.

entries.name: To Hell and Back
entries.desc:
Power Siphon and Implosion summon 1 Imp Gang Boss for every 2 Wild Imps sacrificed. Wild Imps summoned this way gain Unstable Soul.

 Unstable Soul
Increases damage done by 50% and Fel Firebolt now jumps to 4 additional targets.

entries.name: Stabilized Portals
entries.desc: Increases the duration of your Summon Vilefiend, Grimoire: Imp Lord, and Grimoire: Fel Ravager by 3 sec.

entries.name: Mark of Shatug
entries.desc:
Your Summon Vilefiend becomes Summon Gloomhound and learns the following ability:

 Gloom Slash
Tooth and claw are drenched in malignant shadow magic, causing the Gloomhound's melee attacks to deal an additional 120 Shadow damage.

entries.name: Mark of F'harg
entries.desc:
Your Summon Vilefiend becomes Summon Charhound and learns the following ability:

 Infernal Presence
Cloaked in the ever-burning flames of the abyss, dealing 60 Fire damage to enemies within 10 yards every 0.9 sec.

entries.name: Dominion of Argus
entries.desc: Summoning your Demonic Tyrant leaves open a portal to Argus for 15 sec, causing every 2 casts of Hand of Gul'dan to summon a subjugated demon that serves you for 10 sec.

entries.name: Wicked Reaping
entries.desc:
Damage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 10%.

Consuming Demonic Core feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal 914 Shadow damage to your target.

entries.name: Shared Fate
entries.desc:
When you kill a target, its tortured soul is flung into a nearby enemy for 3 sec. This effect inflicts 190 Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds every 0.9 sec.

Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Feast of Souls
entries.desc: When you kill a target, you have a chance to generate a Soul Shard that is guaranteed to be a Succulent Soul.

entries.name: Eternal Servitude
entries.desc: Fel Domination cooldown is reduced by 90 sec.

entries.name: Gorefiend's Resolve
entries.desc: Targets resurrected with Soulstone resurrect with 40% additional health and 80% additional mana.

entries.name: Necrolyte Teachings
entries.desc: Shadow Bolt damage increased by 20%. Power Siphon increases the damage of Demonbolt by an additional 20%.

entries.name: Demoniac's Fervor
entries.desc: Your demonic soul deals 100% increased damage to the main target of Hand of Gul'dan.

entries.name: Sataiel's Volition
entries.desc: Wild Imp damage increased by 35% and Wild Imps that are imploded have an additional 5% chance to grant a Demonic Core.

entries.name: Quietus
entries.desc:
Soul Anathema damage increased by 25% and is dealt 20% faster.

Consuming Demonic Core activates Shared Fate or Feast of Souls.

entries.name: Soul Anathema
entries.desc:
Unleashing your demonic soul bestows a fiendish entity unto the soul of its targets, dealing 488 Shadow damage over 10 sec.

If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Soul Anathema.

entries.name: Gorebound Fortitude
entries.desc: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when consuming a Healthstone, increasing its healing by 30% and increasing your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

entries.name: Friends In Dark Places
entries.desc: Dark Pact now shields you for an additional 50% of the sacrificed health.

entries.name: Demonic Soul
entries.desc:
A demonic entity now inhabits your soul, allowing you to detect if a Soul Shard has a Succulent Soul when it's generated.

Consuming a Succulent Soul unleashes your demonic soul, dealing 1,342 Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Shadow of Death
entries.desc: Your Summon Demonic Tyrant spell is empowered by the demonic entity within you, causing it to grant 3 Soul Shards that each contain a Succulent Soul.

entries.name: Eternal Hunger
entries.desc: Increases the duration of Manifested Avarice by 5 sec and increases the damage of Soul Swipe by 10%.

entries.name: Shared Vessel
entries.desc:
Increases your Mastery by 2%.

This effect is doubled while the demonic entity is aiding you in combat.

entries.name: Manifested Avarice
entries.desc:
Each Succulent Soul consumed has an increasing chance to unleash the Demonic Soul within you, enabling it to assault your enemies for 9 sec.

 Soul Swipe
Strikes nearby enemies with a malevolent claw, dealing 742 Shadow damage to its target and 495 Shadow damage to other enemies in 10 yds.

entries.name: Secrets of the Coven
entries.desc:
Mother of Chaos empowers your next Incinerate to become Infernal Bolt.

 Infernal Bolt
Hurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing 5,119 Fire damage to your enemy target and generating 3 Soul Shards.

entries.name: Ruination
entries.desc:
Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next Chaos Bolt to become Ruination.

 Ruination
Call down a demon-infested meteor from the depths of the Twisting Nether, dealing 9,644 Chaos damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summoning 3 Wild Imps.

Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Abyssal Dominion
entries.desc: Summon Infernal becomes empowered, dealing 40% increased damage. When your Summon Infernal ends, it fragments into two smaller Infernals at 50% effectiveness that lasts 10 sec.

entries.name: Flames of Xoroth
entries.desc: Fire damage increased by 4% and damage dealt by your demons is increased by 4%.

entries.name: Soul-Etched Circles
entries.desc: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when casting Demonic Circle: Teleport, increasing your movement speed by 50% and making you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

entries.name: Annihilan's Bellow
entries.desc: Howl of Terror cooldown is reduced by 10 sec and range is increased by 5 yds.

entries.name: Gloom of Nathreza
entries.desc: Enemies marked by your Havoc take 7% increased damage from your single target spells.

entries.name: Cruelty of Kerxan
entries.desc: Summon Infernal grants Diabolic Ritual and reduces its duration by 3 sec.

entries.name: Infernal Machine
entries.desc: Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells while your Infernal is active decreases the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

entries.name: Cloven Souls
entries.desc: Enemies damaged by your Overlord have their souls cloven, increasing damage taken by you and your pets by 5% for 15 sec.

entries.name: Infernal Vitality
entries.desc: Unending Resolve heals you for 30% of your maximum health over 10 sec.

entries.name: Infernal Bulwark
entries.desc: Unending Resolve grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of your maximum health and increases the maximum amount Soul Leech can absorb by 10% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Diabolic Ritual
entries.desc:
Casting Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn grants Diabolic Ritual for 20 sec. If Diabolic Ritual is already active, its duration is reduced by 1 sec instead.

When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies.

entries.name: Touch of Rancora
entries.desc:
Demonic Art increases the damage of your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn by 20% and reduces its cast time by 50%.

Casting Chaos Bolt reduces the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

entries.name: Mind's Eyes
entries.desc: Your Diabolic Oculi observe the battlefield and collect information that is imparted to you upon being exploded, each Diabolic Oculi increasing your Intellect by 2% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Looks That Kill
entries.desc:
Your Diabolic Oculi now cast Diabolic Gaze at your primary demon's target every 1 sec while active.

 Diabolic Gaze
Fire a beam of destructive chaos magic at the target, dealing 304 Chaos damage.

Damage is increased by 100% per Demonic Oculus active.

entries.name: Diabolic Oculi
entries.desc:
You summon a Diabolic Oculus, up to 3, each time the duration of Diabolic Ritual is reduced by one of your spells.

Diabolic Oculi explode when consuming Demonic Art, dealing 891 Fire damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
